title: Pipelined RISC-V Processors & RTL-to-GDS Flow
subtitle: UMN ASIC Design & EDA Tools Club · Faculty Advisor: Prof. Yu (Kevin) Cao
bullets: Designing RV32I/RV64I 5-stage pipelined processors in Verilog/SystemVerilog; building an RTL-to-GDS flow with Synopsys Design Compiler and Cadence Innovus|Student-led tapeout collaboration with UC Berkeley Tapeout Decal, Cornell C2S2, and Georgia Tech Silicon Jackets

title: 2×2 Systolic Array Matrix Multiplier
subtitle: Full RTL-to-GDSII Flow · SkyWater 130 nm
bullets: Designed an output-stationary 2×2 systolic array in SystemVerilog (4 PEs, each with a MAC + local accumulator, operands rippling one hop/cycle); verified with a skewed-input testbench|Hardened through the full RTL-to-GDSII flow via OpenLane on SKY130 (Yosys → OpenROAD floorplan/place/CTS/route → Magic + KLayout signoff)|DRC-clean GDS, timing closed at 50 MHz (no setup/hold violations); ~388×378 µm die, verified by Magic/KLayout XOR

title: Sparse Matrix Hardware Accelerator
subtitle: Hardware Acceleration Lab · Prof. Zhenman Fang
bullets: RTL/HLS design for sparse matrix × sparse matrix multiplication targeting AI/HPC workloads

title: Avionics Bay PCB & Flight State Estimator
subtitle: UMN Rocket Team — GNC & Avionics
bullets: Designed 4-layer avionics backplane PCB in Altium (CAN bus + separate LoRa telemetry PCB); built a Simulink flight state estimator with embedded C generated for flight-computer deployment
